content.rendered:
Residency by Investment

Pathway to enter one of the world's most flourishing countries through our Residency by Investment Program, offering you and your family a route to prosperity.

Get a Consultation

Your Time to Shine with Best Residency by Investment Schemes

Explore Forecast Immigration’s Residency by Investment Programs that allow for potential relocation without the immediate need to move. These unique opportunities not only provide the freedom to travel across the EU and Schengen Area but also lay the groundwork for permanent residency and eventual citizenship for you and your family. Embrace a path filled with possibilities, by investing in residency and, in time, a new citizenship to your preferred country.

Residency by Investment Schemes

United Kingdom (uk)

Minimum Requirement: £30,000

UK , A dream destination for everyone around the globe. Initiate your process to turn your dream into reality with UK Residency Program.

View Program

United States EB-5

Minimum Requirement: $800,000

The EB-5 Investor Visa, a direct pathway toward USA Green Card. This Business Immigration option in best for foreign investors to relocate to USA.

View Program

United States E-2

Minimum Requirement: $100,000

The E2 investor visa is non-immigrant status for investors who wants to establish business in USA without staying there. spouse is allowed to work.

View Program

Portugal Golden Visa

Minimum Requirement: € 250,000

Portugal as 4th strongest passport globally has the best investment options for investors who want to attain Golden Visa. Permanent Residency is leading to citizenship after 5 years.

View Program

Portugal D2 Visa

Minimum Requirement: €25,000

The Portugal D2 program is a route to get Portugal residency by initiating a business in Portugal that is designed for entrepreneurs and startup creators with a very minimum, affordable budget.

View Program

Portugal D7 Visa

Minimum Requirement: €15,000

Portugal d7 is also known as the Retirement or Passive Income Visa, the Portugal D7 visa is ideal for retirees, entrepreneurs, and expats with investment income. A route to PR leading to citizenship.

View Program

Spain

Minimum Requirement: € 500,000

Renowned as one of Europe’s foremost initiatives, the program offers a wide array of advantages in the vibrant country of Schengen Zone.

View Program

Malta

Minimum Requirement: € 100,000

Malta Residency Program facilitates Schengen access through economic investment for non-EU/EEA individuals. There are multiple options to get Malta PR.

View Program

Greece

Minimum Requirement: € 250,000

Greece Golden Visa offers a renewable five-year Greek residency, including dependent benefits and Schengen Area visa-free access.

View Program

Hungary Residency

Minimum Requirement: €150,000

The Hungarian residency program, the most affordable path to residency, promises business opportunities, top education and a luxurious lifestyle.

View Program

Canada Startup Visa

Minimum Requirement: CAD 75,000

Canada Startup visa is a gateway for nationals from foreign countries to invest and actively manage a business in the country. 

View Program

Canada Business Immigration

Minimum Requirement: CAD 200,000

Canada Business Immigration serves as a route for Investors and Businessmen who want to grow in the most stable economy of Canada.

View Program

United Arab Emirates

Minimum Requirement: AED 2 million

Invest in the business hub of the Arab world that grants you freedom in property transactions without any constraints on purchase or sale.

View Program

Speak to a global expert

Let us guide you through every step of your journey toward new opportunities abroad, ensuring a seamless transition into your next chapter.

Get a Consultation

Benefits of Residency Programs

Global Mobility

Secure residency in strategic locations offering visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to numerous countries, enhancing your global travel possibilities.

Economic Opportunities

By investing in our Residency by Investment programs, tap into a world of business and investment opportunities in growth-oriented markets.

Quality of Life

Experience the high standard of living, with access to exceptional education systems, healthcare facilities, and lifestyle amenities in stable countries.

Tax Optimization

Enjoy favorable tax policies, including potential reductions or exemptions on local income, offering significant financial advantages.

Flexible Programs

Choose when and if to relocate, with programs that don't require immediate physical residency, providing the convenience of planning your move on your terms.
